title: lonicera × bella f. candida
intro: Lonicera × bella f. candida, also known as the Snowdrift honeysuckle or white bell honeysuckle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Lonicera genus of flowering vines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lonicera × bella f. candida include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of allergies, improve sleep quality, and reduce stress levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
